name: Barbecued Beef (Korean Bul Kogi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the steak very thin on the bias. Score each piece with an X.
2. Chop the scallions and crush the garlic.
3. Combine these ingredients with the remaining seasonings in a bowl.
Add the meat to the marinade and mix well until all sides of the steak are coated.
4. The meat may be grilled immediately. For best results, marinate the steak for 2 hours.
The marinade can also be kept overnight.
5. Variation: Rib steak or flank steak can be used.
6. Serve with rice and kimchi.
